name: Private Fairway Midway
about: Private Fairway Midway is a 24-hour indoor golf simulator venue that provides unlimited access to members through a month-to-month membership model. The facility features TrackMan 4 technology, capturing 26 club and ball data points per swing, and offers an immersive golf experience with access to over 250 virtual golf courses. Members can book sessions via the Spaces app and have the flexibility to practice, play, and improve their game in a private environment.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan 4 technology with 26 data points per swing
Ability to book and manage sessions via mobile app
Significant handicap improvement (6-10 strokes) for regular users

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned, BYOB likely allowed
No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB likely allowed

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor capturing 26 club and ball data points per swing

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, since it's a private rental venue, members are expected to bring their own clubs for use with the TrackMan simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website doesn't mention food or drink service, so bringing your own is likely allowed, but specific policies aren't detailed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 virtual holes isn't specified on the website, but it would depend on the course and simulator software used.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specifically mention kid-friendly features or policies, and the focus appears to be on adult golfers and serious practice.
